# Memory Member Catalog (auto-generated — DO NOT EDIT)

One line per memory → its package. Find a memory by name, then read its package.

- **prefer_terse_replies** — Keep answers short and scannable — bullets/tables over prose. → core/output_style.md
- **no_filler_apologies** — No "I'm sorry / as an AI" filler — just correct and continue. → core/output_style.md
